description: Proxy server to bypass Cloudflare and DDoS-GUARD protection.
fullDescription:
FlareSolverr is a powerful proxy server designed to help applications bypass Cloudflare and other anti-bot protections automatically. It works by simulating a real browser environment, allowing scripts and automation tools to access protected websites without being blocked.

By solving JavaScript challenges and security checks in the background, FlareSolverr enables reliable access to websites that normally restrict automated requests. This makes it especially useful for web scraping tools, APIs, and applications that need consistent data access.

Built with flexibility and performance in mind, FlareSolverr integrates easily with various software and supports multiple platforms. Its automated challenge-solving system ensures smooth, secure, and uninterrupted communication with protected websites.

With FlareSolverr, you can:
- Customize Proxy Settings: Fine-tune proxy parameters including rotation frequency, geographical location, and proxy types to optimize your scraping performance and anonymity.
- Real-Time Adjustments: Make instant changes to your proxy configurations to adapt to evolving scraping needs or website defenses.
- Enhanced Security: Utilize advanced features to minimize the risk of detection and ensure your scraping activities remain under the radar.
- Seamless Integration: Easily integrate proxy management with your existing workflows and scraping tools for a smooth, uninterrupted data extraction experience.
- Comprehensive Control: Monitor and adjust proxy usage in real-time, giving you full control over how your data is accessed and collected.
name: flaresolverr
title: FlareSolverr
